title: Youtube Poop: Hotel Phoenix Wright
description:
Phoenix Wright, along with Miles Edgeworth, embarks on a journey into Mushroom Kingdom to save the princess from evil Bowser... well you all know the plot :P

This is my 1st Youtube Poop and my 1st video ever. I hope you like it as much as I do, I've put a lot effort in it :)
enjoy :D

Special thanks to www.court-records.net and all Youtube Poopers for great inspiration ^^

EDIT:
2nd video is up! If you wish to check it, go to http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ipvaKRiAva4 :)

3rd video is up, this time its infamous Faces of Evil :P
http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KhcefSU6LiI

4th video is up, this time it's a horror The Thing! o_O http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C4lURsvxY-g
